# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {name} # replace with your microservice name
  labels:
    app: {app_label} # replace with the label for your application
spec:
  replicas: {replicas} # specify the number of pods you want to run
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {app_label} # must match labels in template metadata
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "{sidecar_value}" # inject either "true" or "false"
      labels:
        app: {app_label} # must match labels on the deployment
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: {container_name} # replace with your microservice container name
        image: {image}  # replace with your docker image path
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080  # replace with your exposed service port
